overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character approaching a futuristic vehicle in a dimly lit parking structure, entering for a slow drive with passengers, and exiting to confront an armed individual near a second vehicle. The scene features warm artificial lighting and high-fidelity futuristic urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with metal fencing

events.description: camera begins circling around the futuristic sedan to show different angles
camera moves from exterior to interior of the vehicle through the rear door

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the vehicle, preparing to enter

notable_agents.action: muscular guard in quilted jacket standing with hands clasped by the car door

entered.detail: sleek silver armored vehicle with angular design and tinted windows
large concrete ceiling structure with embedded lighting
tall metal security fencing along the parking structure edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit parking structure with warm overhead lighting. A muscular guard stands beside a futuristic armored sedan as the camera circles the vehicle, showcasing its angular design. The camera then transitions into the car's interior through the rear passenger door.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury vehicle interior with red ambient lighting

events.description: vehicle begins moving forward through the parking structure
interior lighting shifts as car passes under different overhead lights

agents.ego_description: seated in the back of the moving vehicle, observing the driver and female passenger

notable_agents.action: bald driver gripping the steering wheel and navigating through the garage
female passenger with glowing green cybernetic eyes sitting in the back seat

entered.detail: dark leather interior with red ambient accent lighting
futuristic control panel with illuminated buttons and screens
modern steering wheel with integrated controls

segments.scene_description: Inside the vehicle's luxurious interior with red ambient lighting, the camera captures the driver navigating through the parking structure while a female passenger with cybernetic implants sits in the back. The car moves slowly past concrete pillars and other parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial parking area with HVAC equipment

events.description: camera exits the vehicle to the exterior parking area
camera approaches the armed character standing near the weathered sedan

agents.ego_description: exiting the vehicle and approaching the armed character standing guard

notable_agents.action: character in yellow pants and blue headgear holding a large rifle, standing by a weathered car

entered.detail: older model sedan with rust and wear, parked near the wall
large industrial air conditioning units mounted on the wall
metal roll-up garage door with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the vehicle into a more industrial section of the parking structure featuring large HVAC units on the walls. An armed character stands guard near a weathered older sedan, holding a rifle as the camera approaches. The area is lit by harsh overhead fluorescent lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sleek exterior of a futuristic vehicle into its luxurious cabin before emerging into a harsh industrial zone. It begins in a dimly lit parking structure with warm overhead lighting, circling an angular armored sedan and a muscular guard before gliding through the rear passenger door. As the camera enters the interior, the environment shifts to a space of red ambient lighting where a driver navigates past concrete pillars with a cybernetic passenger in the back. The scene then opens as the camera exits the vehicle, moving from the refined cabin into a gritty industrial section characterized by large HVAC units and cold fluorescent lights. Finally, the movement concludes by approaching an armed guard holding a rifle beside a weathered older sedan.
